title: Book tutorial, platform-spec ADRs, trudoc routing

source.subject: docs(site): book tutorial, platform-spec ADRs, trudoc, and docs routing

body:
## Outcome

Book tutorial, platform-spec ADRs, trudoc, and docs routing.

## Context

- Workstream **docs-site** — see workstream summary on the catalog.
- **trudoc** Zod/frontmatter verification guards platform-spec metadata in CI.
- Normative updates live under `site/website/src/content/docs/platform-spec/` and ship via beskid-lang.org.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`e16bd3a`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/e16bd3a) — docs(site): book tutorial, platform-spec ADRs, trudoc, and docs routing
